overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence showing a caped character walking through a rainy, neon-lit urban environment at night. The character moves from a covered sidewalk past a barber shop, under elevated train tracks, and across wet streets toward a modern corporate building, finally stopping to look up at a large statue perched atop the skyscraper.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk past illuminated storefronts and a barber shop

entered.detail: storefront with illuminated barber pole and signage reading 'BARBER SHOP'
wet metal drainage grates embedded in the concrete sidewalk
dark brick facade with large windows and security bars

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow, rain-slicked sidewalk bordered by historic brick buildings. A barber shop with a glowing red-white-blue pole illuminates the right side, while metal drainage grates cover the wet pavement beneath.

events.description: passes from covered sidewalk to area beneath elevated train tracks and overpass

agents.ego_description: walking under the massive concrete elevated structure past newspaper vending machines

entered.detail: massive concrete support columns and overhead track structure spanning the street
row of newspaper vending machines on the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to a semi-covered area beneath elevated train tracks. The concrete support pillars create a corridor effect, with newspaper stands visible on the left and the FOXTECA building becoming visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open intersection with modern corporate buildings

events.description: emerges from under the overpass into the open street area
begins crossing the wet asphalt street toward the FOXTECA building entrance

agents.ego_description: crossing the rain-slicked street toward the illuminated FOXTECA corporate building

entered.detail: modern dark glass corporate headquarters with illuminated 'FOXTECA' signage
tall modern skyscraper with reflective glass facade

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the overpass into an open plaza, the character crosses the wet asphalt street toward the FOXTECA building. The modern glass tower dominates the center view while rain creates reflective pools on the ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza looking up at skyscraper with rooftop statue

events.description: stops walking and tilts camera upward to look at the building rooftop
camera reveals large gargoyle-like statue perched atop the building against the night sky

agents.ego_description: standing still and looking up at the statue perched on the building roof

entered.detail: large dark statue or gargoyle perched on the building rooftop against the sky
upper floors and spires of surrounding glass towers

segments.scene_description: The character stops at the building base and looks straight up, revealing a massive statue perched atop the FOXTECA skyscraper. The camera tilts upward to show the statue silhouetted against the dark rainy sky, with surrounding glass towers rising on either side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked urban corridor that gradually opens into a vast corporate plaza dominated by a towering skyscraper. It begins with the character walking along a narrow sidewalk bordered by historic brick buildings, passing a glowing barber shop pole that reflects off the wet pavement. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts into a semi-covered corridor beneath elevated train tracks, where concrete pillars and newspaper stands frame the distant view of the FOXTECA building. The camera then emerges from the overpass into an open plaza, crossing reflective asphalt streets toward the modern glass tower. Finally, the character stops at the building's base as the camera tilts sharply upward to reveal a massive statue silhouetted against the dark, rainy sky.
